title: April 21
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 21''' is the 111th day of the year (112th in leap years). There are 254 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1929|1929]] – [[Ken Nightingall]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Jeff Anderson]] is born.
*[[1976]] – Filming ends at [[Elstree Studios]] for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']] interior [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|cantina]] shots.
*[[1981]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 49|''Star Wars'' (1977) 49]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Marjorie Eaton]] dies.
*[[1992]] – [[Dark Empire 3|''Dark Empire'' 3]] published.
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' novelization]] published.
*1999 – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace Illustrated Screenplay]]'' published.
*1999 – [[Star Wars (1998) 5|''Star Wars'' (1998) 5]] published.
*1999 – [[Vader's Quest 3|''Vader's Quest'' 3]] published.
*[[2004]] – [[Empire 18|''Empire'' 18]] published.
*2004 – [[Mary Selway]] dies.
*[[2005]] – [[Celebration III]] begins.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars Insider 157|''Star Wars Insider'' 157]] published.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Jedi Academy: At Last, Jedi]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: How to Speak Astromech with BB-8]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 9|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 9]] published.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Phase III – Trials of the Jedi Omnibus]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: Hyperspace Stories—Tides of Terror (trade paperback)]]''  to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian – Seasons One & Two]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Art of Coloring: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu]]'' to be published.
